question.label: Thread follow
question.name: proud outcomes, pace — can you say more about what that means for you right now?
question.description: Runtime thread-follow injected because planner did not follow substantive answer.

answer: I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.

assessment.note: Names a specific absence — substantive feedback on key decisions — suggesting the pace strain is tied to low support and leaving engagement mildly dented; also flags a clarity issue worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Decision feedback
new_queue.name: On key decisions, what feedback are you not getting that would help most?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Keep or delegate
new_queue.name: What do you think only you should own right now?

new_queue.label: Closer next step
new_queue.name: Given what we’ve covered, where do you want to focus first?

issues: coverage: injected growth into next question (0 touches after turn 5)

history.answer_excerpt: I am proud of the outcomes, but the pace should not be normal.
I still do not get enough substantive feedback on key decisions.
The last stretch shipped, but it was heavier than I made it sound.
Late nights came from carrying decision bottlenecks and final reviews.
Some of that work could have moved to the team sooner.
